children.label: A
children.text: shall not be required to obtain a license; but

children.label: B
children.text: shall meet all applicable standards for licensure.

children.heading: Home- and community-based service
children.label: 2 Home- and community-based service
children.text: The term “home- and community-based service” means 1 or more of the services specified in paragraphs (1) through (9) of (whether provided by the Service or by an Indian tribe or tribal organization pursuant to the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act ( et seq.)) that are or will be provided in accordance with applicable standards.section 1396t(a) of title 4225 U.S.C. 4501See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: the items and services specified in subparagraphs (A) through (H) of ; andsection 1395x(dd)(1) of title 42

children.label: B
children.text: such other services as an Indian tribe or tribal organization determines are necessary and appropriate to provide in furtherance of that care.

children.heading: Long-term care services
children.label: 4 Long-term care services
children.text: The term “long-term care services” has the meaning given the term “qualified long-term care services” in .section 7702B(c) of title 26
Individuals who are unable to perform a certain number of activities of daily living without assistance.
Individuals with a mental impairment, such as dementia, Alzheimer’s disease, or another disabling mental illness, who may be able to perform activities of daily living under supervision.
Such other individuals as an applicable tribal health program determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Authorization of convenient care services
children.label: d Authorization of convenient care services
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Service, Indian tribes, and tribal organizations, may also provide funding under this chapter to meet the objectives set forth in for convenient care services programs pursuant to .section 1602 of this titlesection 1637(c)(2)(A) of this title
